standardCarePlanSteps: Review reported symptoms and intake need summary.
Check heat exposure, hydration risk, and nearest active facility.
Escalate to a representative for high-risk, heat-stressed, or queue-delayed cases.
Record guidance and follow-up requirements in the health record.
redFlags: child under five with high fever
disclaimer: AgriNexus AI guidance supports trained operators and does not replace licensed clinical judgment or emergency care.
